text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon displays a stellar run at the
Satsuki Sho G1 race!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
...Yes. These findings aren't bad at all. Many
points are in line with the results of the trial
experiment, and my preparations have gone
along swimmingly. My hard work has paid off.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
However... having experienced these results
firsthand, I now see even further latent potential.
With th—

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's you, Trainer. I was just talking to myself.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
More importantly, I ran in both the Yayoi Sho and
Satsuki Sho races, true to my word.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Which leaves me with just one more of the
Classics...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Ha, you would beat me to it. That is the next
logical step. Still...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
For this next occasion, I hope you'll allow me to
take the helm. The odds for Plan A aren't looking
too favorable.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Ah, that's... for me to know. You need not worry
about it.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
The point is, I cannot promise that I'll run in the
race. I hope I'm making myself clear.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For some reason, her assertion comes off more
forceful than usual.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Good. Well, time is of the essence! With all the
data I've just gathered from my competitors, I
must make haste in resuming my experiments!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: It is the time to put Plan B into action.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She walks off alone, leaving me to wonder what
her real intentions might be.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For now, what I do know is that she's serious
about running in the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But in the end, it'll all be up to her.
